info.title: Überböse Streaming API
info.description:
The missing API specifications for your streaming device.

This api spec combines the APIs of 4 different APIs / domains your speaker contacts.

- **marge**: Account bound API managing source providers, presets, recents, and devices
- **stats**: Device analytics and telemetry API collecting playback events and diagnostics
- **software-update**: Firmware update information
- **bmx**: API for streaming radio services (TuneIn, Custom Stations, etc.)

get.description: Retrieves a list of available streaming source providers

200.description: Successful response with list of source providers

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

403.description: Forbidden - Valid token but insufficient permissions

post.description: Adds a recent item to the device's recent history

application/vnd.bose.streaming-v1.2+xml.example:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<recent id="2244536342">
  <contentItemType>stationurl</contentItemType>
  <createdOn>2018-11-27T18:20:01.000+00:00</createdOn>
  <lastplayedat>2025-11-01T17:32:59.000+00:00</lastplayedat>
  <location>/v1/playback/station/s80044</location>
  <name>Radio TEDDY</name>
  <source id="19989313" type="Audio">
    <createdOn>2018-08-11T08:55:41.000+00:00</createdOn>
    <credential type="token">eyDu=</credential>
    <name></name>
    <sourceproviderid>25</sourceproviderid>
    <sourcename></sourcename>
    <sourceSettings/>
    <updatedOn>2019-07-20T17:48:31.000+00:00</updatedOn>
    <username></username>
  </source>
  <sourceid>19989313</sourceid>
  <updatedOn>2025-11-01T17:33:00.574+00:00</updatedOn>
</recent>

get.description: Retrieves complete account information including devices, presets, recents, and sources

200.description: Successful response with full account details

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

403.description: Forbidden - Valid token but insufficient permissions

400.description: Bad request - Invalid request body or parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

403.description: Forbidden - Valid token but insufficient permissions

404.description: Not found - Account or device not found

delete.description:
Unpairs the device from the marge account.
This can be triggerd by calling:

```
POST http://<speaker-id>:8090/setMargeAccount
Accept: application/xml
Content-Type: application/xml

<UnPairDeviceWithAccount/>
```

application/vnd.bose.streaming-v1.2+xml.example:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<status>
  <message>Device does not exist </message>
  <status-code>4012</status-code>
</status>

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

post.description:
Registers/pairs a device (speaker) to a marge account.
Associates the device ID with the marge account ID.
This can be triggerd by calling:

```
POST http://<speaker-id>:8090/setMargeAccount
Accept: application/xml
Content-Type: application/xml

<PairDeviceWithAccount>
  <accountId>6921042</accountId>
  <userAuthToken>Bearer test123</userAuthToken>
</PairDeviceWithAccount>
```

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

get.description: Unclear. Returns empty 200 ok response for me

post.description:
Unclear. Returns 500 server error in testing.
Endpoint called by Bose SoundTouch devices when they power on.
Reports device information and diagnostic data including IP address.

application/vnd.bose.streaming-v1.2+xml.example:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<device-data>
  <device id="587A628A4042">
    <serialnumber>P123456789101123456789</serialnumber>
    <firmware-version>27.0.6.46330.5043500 epdbuild.trunk.hepdswbld04.2022-08-04T11:20:29</firmware-version>
    <product product_code="SoundTouch 10 sm2" type="5">
      <serialnumber>069236P81556160AE</serialnumber>
    </product>
  </device>
  <diagnostic-data>
    <device-landscape>
    <rssi>Good</rssi>
    <gateway-ip-address>192.168.178.1</gateway-ip-address>
    <macaddresses>
    <macaddress>587A628A4042</macaddress>
    <macaddress>40BD32BAB0EB</macaddress>
    </macaddresses><ip-address>192.168.178.50</ip-address>
    <network-connection-type>Wireless</network-connection-type>
    </device-landscape><network-landscape>
    <network-data xmlns="http://www.Bose.com/Schemas/2012-12/NetworkMonitor/" />
    </network-landscape>
  </diagnostic-data>
</device-data>

200.description: Successfully recorded device power on event

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

post.description: Creates a new speaker group (stereo pair) with master device and roles

400.description: Bad request - Device already in group

application/vnd.bose.streaming-v1.2+xml.example:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<error>
  <status-code>4041</status-code>
  <message>Device 587A628A4042 already belongs to a group</message>
</error>

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

delete.description: Deletes an existing device group (stereo pair) by its ID

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the group to delete

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

put.description: Updates an existing device group's name and/or master device

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the group to update

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

get.description:
Retrieves group information for a device.
Returns an empty group element if the device is not in a group

200.description:
Successful response.
Returns full group information if device is in a group,
or empty group element if not.

deviceNotInGroup.summary: Device is not in a group

400.description: Bad request - Device does not exist

application/vnd.bose.streaming-v1.2+xml.example:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<status>
  <message>Device does not exist</message>
  <status-code>4012</status-code>
</status>

example.scope: playlist-read-private playlist-read-collaborative streaming user-library-read user-library-modify playlist-modify-private playlist-modify-public user-read-email user-read-private user-top-read

200.description: Successful response with software update information

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

post.description:
Endpoint called by Bose SoundTouch devices to submit customer support diagnostic data.
Reports device information, firmware version, product details, and network diagnostic data.
I believe the call is triggered when opening CS pages in the Bose Soundtuch app.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

get.description:
Unclear. Returns 200 ok response with empty body
and an `Authorization` header with a value containing A-Z, a-z, 0-9, +, /

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

403.description: Forbidden - Valid token but insufficient permissions

post.description:
Endpoint called by Bose SoundTouch devices to submit event data.
Events include playback state changes, source changes, button presses, and more.
Every submitted event has a `type` field. Types seen in the wild include:

- art-changed
- favorite-changed
- item-started
- masterdevice-changed
- play-item
- play-state-changed
- playpause-pressed
- power-pressed
- preset-pressed
- shuffle-state-changed
- skip-forward-pressed
- source-state-changed
- system-state-changed
- volume-change

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

get.description:
Returns the list of available BMX streaming services (TuneIn, Custom Stations, SiriusXM, Radioplayer).
This endpoint provides service discovery for streaming audio providers.

200.description: Successful response with list of BMX services

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

get.description: Returns which streaming services can be added or removed from the user's account.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

get.description:
Returns stream URLs and metadata for a TuneIn radio station.
Fetches real-time data from TuneIn APIs including available stream URLs,
station name, logo, and playback configuration.

200.description: Successful response with station playback information

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

get.description:
Returns playback information for custom radio streams.
The stream data is provided as base64-encoded JSON in the 'data' query parameter.
Supports user-defined radio station URLs.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description:
Base64-encoded JSON containing stream information.
JSON structure: {"streamUrl": "...", "imageUrl": "...", "name": "..."}

200.description: Successful response with custom stream playback information

400.description: Bad request - Invalid or missing data parameter

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

post.description:
Refreshes a TuneIn JWT authentication token using a refresh token.
Required for maintaining access to TuneIn authenticated features.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or expired refresh token

post.description:
Analytics endpoint for reporting playback events to TuneIn.
This is a stub implementation that accepts and logs events but does not forward them.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Bearer token

SourceProvidersResponse.description: XML response containing list of source providers

id.description: Unique identifier for the source provider

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the provider was created

name.description: Name/type of the streaming source provider

updatedOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the provider was last updated

RecentItemRequest.description: XML request body for adding a recent item

lastplayedat.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the item was last played

RecentItemResponse.description: XML response containing recent item details

id.description: Unique identifier for the recent item

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the item was created

lastplayedat.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the item was last played

updatedOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the item was last updated

Source.description: Source information for accounts, devices, presets, and recent items

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the source was created

updatedOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the source was last updated

code.description: Authorization code (empty for refresh token flow)

redirect_uri.description: Redirect URI (empty for refresh token flow)

refresh_token.description: Refresh token to exchange for new access token

scope.example: playlist-read-private playlist-read-collaborative streaming user-library-read user-library-modify playlist-modify-private playlist-modify-public user-read-email user-read-private user-top-read

FullAccountResponse.description: XML response containing complete account information

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the device was created

updatedOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the device was last updated

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the preset was created

updatedOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the preset was last updated

PresetUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating a preset

PresetUpdateResponse.description: XML response containing updated preset details

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the preset was created

updatedOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the preset was last updated

RecentItem.description: Recent item played on the device

id.description: Unique identifier for the recent item

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the item was created

lastplayedat.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the item was last played

updatedOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the item was last updated

masterDeviceId.description: Device ID of the master device in the group

GroupRequest.description: XML request to create a new device group

masterDeviceId.description: Device ID of the master device in the group

GroupUpdateRequest.description: XML request to update an existing device group

masterDeviceId.description: Device ID of master (must be LEFT or RIGHT device in the group)

GroupRole.description: Role assignment for a device in a group

role.description: Role of the device in the group

PowerOnRequest.description: XML request body for power on support with device diagnostic data

PowerOnProduct.description: Product information for power on request

PowerOnDevice.description: Device information for power on request

DiagnosticData.description: Diagnostic data including device and network information

message.example: Server Error: java.lang.RuntimeException: Failed : HTTP error code : 403

SoftwareUpdateResponse.description: XML response containing software update information

softwareUpdateLocation.description: Location URL for software update (empty if no update available)

DeviceUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating device information

createdOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when device was first seen

updatedOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when device was last updated

CustomerSupportRequest.description: XML request body for customer support with device diagnostic data

DeviceEventsRequest.description: JSON request body for device events

EventPayload.description: Event payload containing device info and events

BmxServicesResponse.description: JSON response containing list of BMX services

askAgainAfter.description: Milliseconds until client should request service list again

bmx_services.description: List of available BMX streaming services

BmxLinkWithClient.description: HAL-style link with client usage hint

askAdapter.description: Whether to ask adapter for service info

baseUrl.description: Base URL for service API calls

description.example: With TuneIn on SoundTouch, listen to more than 100,000 stations

isFavorite.description: Whether station is marked as favorite

refresh_token.description: Refresh token to exchange for access token

reasonSubCode.description: Sub-code providing additional detail about the reason

nextReportIn.description: Seconds until next report should be sent

services.description: List of services with their availability status

BmxServiceAvailability.description: Availability status for a single service

canAdd.description: Whether the service can be added to the account

canRemove.description: Whether the service can be removed from the account
